message:
chore(beads): add cross-project integration beads for sibling Rust ecosystem crates

Create 6 new issues tracking integration of frankensearch with sibling
projects in the franken-* ecosystem:

Ready now (P2):
- bd-2hk9: Integrate fast_cmaes for automated search hyperparameter
  optimization — CMA-ES tuning of blend_factor, RRF K, candidate
  budgets, and timeout thresholds against the test fixture corpus,
  replacing hand-picked defaults in TwoTierConfig

Blocked on upstream maturity (P4):
- bd-2ba5: Replace ONNX Runtime with frankentorch for native Rust
  embedding and reranking inference — eliminates the heaviest C/C++
  dependency, making frankensearch fully native Rust
- bd-1pfc: Use frankenjax vmap semantics for automatic batch embedding
  vectorization — lifts single-doc embed into optimal batched forward
  pass without manual batch-size tuning
- bd-3urr: Add frankenredis as persistent/distributed embedding cache
  layer — cross-process cache keyed by (embedder_revision, text_hash),
  distinct from the in-process S3-FIFO cache (bd-l7v)
- bd-3c0e: Use frankenscipy solvers for score calibration numerical
  methods — L-BFGS for Platt scaling, PAV for isotonic regression,
  depends on bd-22k
- bd-8ks0: Integrate franken_networkx for graph-aware ranking signal
  and result diversification — adds structural/graph signal as third
  fusion input alongside lexical and semantic

Existing coverage confirmed for frankensqlite (bd-3w1 epic) and
frankentui (bd-2hz.7, bd-2yu epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
